sentences.target: Ich hänge das Plakat ins Fenster.

translations.de: Ich hänge das Plakat ins Fenster.
translations.en: I'm hanging the poster in the window.
translations.es: Estoy pegando el póster en la ventana.
translations.fr: Je colle l'affiche sur la fenêtre.
translations.pt: Estou colando o cartaz na janela.
translations.he: אני מדביק את הפוסטר על החלון.
translations.vi: Tôi đang dán áp phích lên cửa sổ.
translations.nl: Ik plak de poster op het raam.
translations.hi: मैं खिड़की पर पोस्टर लगा रहा हूँ।
translations.sv: Jag sätter upp affischen i fönstret.
translations.da: Jeg sætter plakaten op i vinduet.
translations.ja: 窓にポスターを貼っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present 1st person singular; transitive verb selecting an accusative object and a directional PP.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of 'Plakat' as direct object.
Common noun, neuter; accusative direct object of 'hänge'.
Preposition (contraction of 'in das'); two-way preposition using accusative to mark motion into a location; introduces the PP.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'ins' (accusative for direction).

sentences.target: Das Plakat ist zu groß für die Tür.
sentences.reading: /das plaˈkaːt ɪst tsuː ɡʁoːs fyːɐ diː tyːɐ./

translations.de: Das Plakat ist zu groß für die Tür.
translations.ipa: /das plaˈkaːt ɪst tsuː ɡʁoːs fyːɐ diː tyːɐ./
translations.en: The poster is too big for the door.
translations.es: El póster es demasiado grande para la puerta.
translations.fr: L'affiche est trop grande pour la porte.
translations.it: Il poster è troppo grande per la porta.
translations.zh-Hans: 这张海报对门来说太大了。
translations.yue: 張海報對門嚟講太大啦。
translations.pt: O cartaz é grande demais para a porta.
translations.vi: Tấm áp phích quá lớn so với cánh cửa.
translations.nl: De poster is te groot voor de deur.
translations.hu: A poszter túl nagy az ajtóra.
translations.hi: पोस्टर दरवाज़े के लिए बहुत बड़ा है।
translations.pl: Plakat jest za duży na drzwi.
translations.el: Η αφίσα είναι πολύ μεγάλη για την πόρτα.
translations.nb: Plakaten er for stor for døra.
translations.id: Poster itu terlalu besar untuk pintu.
translations.sv: Affischen är för stor för dörren.
translations.ro: Afișul este prea mare pentru ușă.
translations.cs: Plakát je příliš velký na dveře.
translations.da: Plakaten er for stor til døren.
translations.ja: そのポスターはドアには大きすぎます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, neuter nominative singular; determiner of the subject 'Plakat'.
Common noun, neuter; sentence subject.
Copula (auxiliary) linking the subject to the predicative adjective.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective 'groß' ('too big').
Predicative adjective complement with the copula; describes the subject.
Preposition selecting accusative; introduces a PP expressing suitability/target.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Tür'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Sie malt ein Plakat für das Konzert.
sentences.reading: /ziː malt aɪ̯n plaˈkaːt fyːɐ das kɔnˈtsɛʁt./

translations.de: Sie malt ein Plakat für das Konzert.
translations.ipa: /ziː malt aɪ̯n plaˈkaːt fyːɐ das kɔnˈtsɛʁt./
translations.en: She's painting a poster for the concert.
translations.es: Ella está pintando un póster para el concierto.
translations.fr: Elle peint une affiche pour le concert.
translations.it: Sta dipingendo un poster per il concerto.
translations.ko: 그녀는 콘서트를 위한 포스터를 그리고 있어요.
translations.yue: 佢喺度為音樂會畫海報。
translations.pt: Ela está pintando um cartaz para o concerto.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đang vẽ một tấm áp phích cho buổi hòa nhạc.
translations.nl: Ze maakt een poster voor het concert.
translations.hi: वह कॉन्सर्ट के लिए पोस्टर बना रही है।
translations.el: Ζωγραφίζει μια αφίσα για τη συναυλία.
translations.nb: Hun maler en plakat til konserten.
translations.id: Dia sedang melukis poster untuk konser.
translations.sv: Hon målar en affisch till konserten.
translations.ro: Ea pictează un afiș pentru concert.
translations.da: Hun maler en plakat til koncerten.
translations.ja: 彼女はコンサートのポスターを描いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative; subject (sentence-initial capitalization).
Finite main verb, present 3rd person singular; transitive, selecting an accusative object and a 'für'-PP.
Indefinite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of 'Plakat'.
Common noun, neuter; accusative direct object of 'malt'.
Preposition selecting accusative; introduces a PP indicating beneficiary/purpose.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of 'Konzert'.
Common noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Du hast das Plakat im Internet gekauft.
sentences.reading: /du hast das plaˈkaːt ɪm ˈɪntɐnɛt ɡəˈkaʊ̯ft./

translations.de: Du hast das Plakat im Internet gekauft.
translations.ipa: /du hast das plaˈkaːt ɪm ˈɪntɐnɛt ɡəˈkaʊ̯ft./
translations.fr: Tu as acheté l'affiche en ligne.
translations.it: Hai comprato il poster su internet.
translations.zh-Hans: 你在网上买了这张海报。
translations.pt: Você comprou o cartaz na internet.
translations.vi: Bạn đã mua tấm áp phích trên mạng.
translations.nl: Je hebt de poster online gekocht.
translations.id: Kamu membeli poster itu secara online.
translations.cs: Koupil jsi ten plakát na internetu.
translations.ja: あなたはそのポスターをネットで買った。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject.
Auxiliary verb, present 2nd person singular; forms the perfect with the participle.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of 'Plakat' as direct object.
Common noun, neuter; accusative direct object of 'gekauft'.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'); two-way preposition using dative to mark location; introduces the PP.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'im' (dative), indicating location/source of purchase.
Past participle; lexical verb in perfect construction with 'hast', positioned clause-final.
